examples: This objection was reasonable when only early theropod clavicles had been discovered, but fossilized theropod clavicles that look just like the wishbone of Archaeopteryx have now been unearthed.
Wishing upon a wishbone is an ancient custom.
Never grow a wishbone, daughter, where your backbone ought to be.
Cars were tossed like toys, some sitting in enormous trees suddenly reduced to a single gnarly wishbone.
To non-sports fans, Finebaum's name might be as foreign as the wishbone offense.
